prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `d19f7514`.
codex_response:
Implemented `d19f7514` as a new ARC2 task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d19f7514/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d19f7514/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d19f7514/generator.py#L1). The rule is: split the 12x4 input into top and bottom 6x4 halves, overlay them position-wise, and emit color `4` wherever either half is nonzero. The summary hint was used, not discarded, because it matched all official examples.

The verifier stays RE-ARC-style and DSL-only. The generator explicitly samples the latent 6x4 union mask first, then assigns each occupied output cell to `top-only`, `bottom-only`, or `both`, which keeps the input family close to the official density and overlap profile. No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: `5/5` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d19f7514/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d19f7514/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d19f7514/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d19f7514/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d19f7514/previews/preview_03.png). No terminal image renderer was available here, so the final sanity check used sampled generated examples from `task.json` plus artifact existence/dimensions.
